test.command: echo 'Tests cannot run on Mac - write tests for CI only'
test.notes: Test suite does not run on macOS per services.yaml and AGENTS.md. Tests are written for CI (Linux). No new test failures introduced (pre-existing macOS constraint).

typecheck.notes: 1778 mypy errors found, identical to Round 1 baseline. All errors are pre-existing. No new type errors introduced by v2-continuous-discovery-scrutiny-fixes changes.

lint.notes: 121 ruff errors found (down from 122 in Round 1 — 1 pre-existing error fixed). All remaining errors are pre-existing. No new lint violations introduced.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the mypy invocation to use the correct venv path for this project: /Users/bryan/code/ypricemagic-server/.venv/bin/python -m mypy y/ (not /Users/bryan/code/ypricemagic/.venv/bin/python). The wrong venv is referenced in the skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers (v2-price-regression-tests, v2-continuous-discovery, v2-continuous-discovery-scrutiny-fixes) noted the skill references /Users/bryan/code/ypricemagic/.venv but the correct venv is /Users/bryan/code/ypricemagic-server/.venv. All three flagged this in skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refine the 'Do NOT run tests locally' instruction to distinguish: (1) Structural tests (no-RPC, no brownie network) CAN be run locally on Mac — workers should run these; (2) Integration tests (those marked @mainnet_only or @pytest.mark.slow) cannot run locally. The current blanket prohibition causes workers to skip structural test verification unnecessarily.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: v2-continuous-discovery worker ran structural pytest tests locally (3 passing) by filtering with '-k not slow -p no:pytest_ethereum'. The fix worker (v2-continuous-discovery-scrutiny-fixes) again noted this distinction in skillFeedback. The blanket prohibition is repeated in the fix review's sharedStateObservations as a persistent systemic issue.

rejectedObservations.observation: 30s polling interval is undocumented in AGENTS.md/library (from fix review sharedStateObservations)
rejectedObservations.reason: Already documented in .factory/library/architecture.md (Round 1 applied update): 'polls every 30 seconds'. No further action needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: events._objects.insert() accesses private attribute with type: ignore[arg-type] (from fix review sharedStateObservations)
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor maintainability concern but matches existing codebase patterns. Not actionable for library/AGENTS.md — it's an implementation detail, not a cross-worker convention.

rejectedObservations.observation: test_new_pool_added_to_index_incrementally duplicates production update logic rather than sharing a helper (from fix review)
rejectedObservations.reason: Non-blocking code quality concern local to one test. Not a cross-worker pattern issue — no AGENTS.md or skill guidance needed.

rejectedObservations.observation: VAL-V2CD-003 warm restart timing only verifiable via smoke test (from fix review)
rejectedObservations.reason: Accepted limitation given macOS test constraints. The existing smoke_test command in services.yaml covers this. No new guidance needed.
